Name: De Klipkraal Merino Stud Rams – 48 Registered Rams
Description: 48 registered Merino stud rams, SAMSA-recorded, average staple length 90mm, fibre diameter 18.5 microns. Top SA show rams. DNA-profiled. Valued individually at ZAR 25,000–45,000. De Klipkraal Merino Stud, Graaff-Reinet.

Name: De Klipkraal Merino Breeding Ewes – 1,800 Recorded Ewes
Description: 1,800 SAMSA-registered Merino breeding ewes, 2–5 years, average fibre diameter 19.2 microns, fleece weight 5.4kg. Karakul tail-marker mating system. Semi-intensive Karoo veld management.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Land Bank Farm Finance facility

Name: De Klipkraal Merino Hoggets – 520 Yearling Females
Description: 520 Merino ewe hoggets (yearling females), 8–14 months. First-shear cohort. Average first-shear fleece weight 3.8kg, 20.1 micron average. Replacement stock for breeding flock. SAMSA tagged.

Name: De Klipkraal Merino Wethers – 280 Castrated Males (Slaughter)
Description: 280 Merino wethers, 12–18 months, on Karoo veld finish for premium lamb and mutton. Target slaughter weight 42kg live. Contracted to Cape Town Master Butcher Association at R52/kg live weight.

Name: De Klipkraal Dorper Ram Breeding Group – 20 Rams
Description: 20 Dorper rams for Dorper×Merino commercial cross programme. SA Dorper Society registered. Average birth weight EBV +0.4, growth rate EBV +2.1. Used for terminal sire crosses on maiden ewes.

Name: De Klipkraal Angora Goat Herd – 150 Bucks & Does
Description: 150 registered Angora goats (120 does, 30 bucks), South African Mohair Growers Association records. Average fibre diameter 27 microns, lock length 120mm. Annual mohair yield: 2.7kg/head.

Name: De Klipkraal Cattle Herd – 85 Bonsmara Cross Cattle
Description: 85 Bonsmara-cross cattle (60 cows, 25 steers) for drought year fallback protein production. Raised on extensive Karoo veld. Weaning rate 78%. Sold at Graaff-Reinet livestock auction.

Name: De Klipkraal Breeding Horses – 6 Boerperd Working Horses
Description: 6 registered SA Boerperd horses (3 mares, 2 geldings, 1 stallion) for sheep mustering, game herding and tourism trail rides on the farm. SA Studbook Boerperd records maintained.

Name: De Klipkraal Main Farm – Title Deed 4,800ha Karoo Veld
Description: Title Deed for De Klipkraal 4,800-hectare main farm, Graaff-Reinet district. Succulent Karoo biome with Mixed Karoo Shrubveld. LCC Class IIIb. SG Diagram T7845/1965. Carrying capacity: 1 large stock unit/12ha.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Land Bank Farm Finance facility

Name: De Klipkraal Outspan 2 – Title Deed 1,200ha Lease Area
Description: State lease for 1,200 hectares of adjacent communal grazing land. Department of Agriculture EC Lease Ref: GRNF/2018/0041. Used for seasonal relief grazing during drought years. Annual renewable.

Name: De Klipkraal Homestead Erf – Title Deed 2ha Homestead
Description: Deed of Transfer for 2-hectare homestead erf. Includes 8-bedroom Victorian farmhouse (1902 heritage listed), shearing shed (capacity 400 sheep/day), ram barn, and guest cottage complex.

Name: De Klipkraal Karoo Koppie Conservation Block – 800ha
Description: 800-hectare conservation block protecting De Klipkraal Koppie, a rocky sandstone outcrop supporting endemic Karoo flora and fauna. Enrolled in CapeNature Biodiversity Stewardship Programme.

Name: Heiniger Omega Shearing Handpiece Set – 12 Shearing Stations
Description: 12 Heiniger Omega electric shearing handpieces with overhead hanging equipment, PowerLine drive, Heiniger Orio blades. Full shearing shed setup for 400 sheep/day throughput. NWGA-certified shed.

Name: Prattley Sheep Handling System – Footbath, Drafting & Weighbridge
Description: Complete Prattley heavy-duty sheep handling system: 200-head round yard, pressure footbath, 3-way electronic drafting gate (SmartDraft), 500kg platform weighbridge. All hot-dip galvanised.

Name: Franklin Electric Borehole Pump #1 – North Camp (11kW)
Description: Franklin Electric 4" submersible borehole pump, 11kW, with 3kW solar array. North camp water supply. Flow: 8 m³/hr at 80m head. 10,000L galvanised header tank. Installed 2022.

Name: Franklin Electric Borehole Pump #2 – South Camp (7.5kW)
Description: Franklin Electric 4" submersible borehole pump, 7.5kW, with 5kW solar array and 15,000L concrete reservoir. South camp water supply. Flow: 6 m³/hr at 90m head. Installed 2023.

Name: Franklin Electric Borehole Pump #3 – Homestead (5.5kW)
Description: Franklin Electric 4" submersible pump, 5.5kW, grid-powered with battery backup. Homestead water supply including shearing shed, ram barn and garden. Flow: 5 m³/hr at 60m head.

Name: Toyota Land Cruiser 79 Double Cab 4x4 (Plates: CA 804 326)
Description: 2023 Toyota Land Cruiser 79 Series double cab, 4.5L V8 diesel, 4WD with diff-lock. Used for farm management, vet call-outs and sheep movement across 4,800ha rough-terrain Karoo farm.

Name: Double-Deck Sheep Float Trailer – 200-Sheep Capacity
Description: Custom-built double-deck hydraulic sheep float, 200-sheep capacity, aluminium construction, padded partitions, ventilation flaps. Used for stud ram sales and livestock movement to auction.

Name: Gallagher Solar Electric Fencing – 45km Paddock System
Description: Gallagher S100 solar energizer system powering 45km of 6-wire electric fence dividing farm into 24 paddocks for rotational grazing. GSM fault alert. Installed and maintained 2021–2024.

Name: Merino Wool Bale Lot – 3,200kg (64 Bales, 19.5 Micron)
Description: SAMSA-certified Merino wool consignment, 64 bales x 50kg = 3,200kg, 19.5 micron average, 90mm staple, vegetable matter 0.3%. Stored at De Wet Wol Depot, Port Elizabeth. Ready for Cape Wools SA sale.

Name: Angora Mohair Clip – 405kg (SAMGA-certified Kid Mohair)
Description: SAMGA-certified Angora mohair clip, 405kg, from first-clip kid goats. Fibre diameter 26.8 microns. Stored at Port Elizabeth SAMGA depot. Top-quality kid mohair consigned for Italian textile export.

Name: Karoo Lamb Frozen Carcass Stock – 280 Carcasses (8.4 tonnes)
Description: HACCP-certified receipt for 280 Karoo lamb carcasses, avg 30kg each = 8.4 tonnes, blast-frozen at Graaff-Reinet abattoir cold store. Premium PGI Karoo Lamb label. Contracted to Woolworths SA.

Name: De Klipkraal Karoo Honey Apiary – 90 Langstroth Hives
Description: 90 Langstroth hives on the koppie conservation block. Apis mellifera capensis/scutellata colonies foraging on endemic Karoo flora (Ruschia, Drosanthemum). Produces prized Karoo Fynbos Honey: 3.6t/annum.

Name: Farm Borehole Water Use License – 60,000 m³/annum
Description: DWS Schedule 1 general use exemption + Schedule 2 license. 3 boreholes authorized for combined 60,000 m³/annum extraction for livestock watering, shearing shed and garden. License Ref: DWS/EC/GRF/2019/001.
